head.desc: Embodied-AI data-asset operator · Data flows like tide

s1.title: About us
s1.desc: We don't build ships or chart seas. We build buoys, lighthouses and current-monitoring networks.
s1.p1: Dolphins are the smartest mammals in the ocean. They sense the world with sonar, survive through pod cooperation, and conquer the deep with agile grace.
s1.p2: Dolphin Lynxi takes its meaning from this — the advance of embodied AI rests on three foundations: robot bodies, foundation models, and data. We choose to commit ourselves to one of them — data — in depth, in breadth, and for the long run.
s1.p3: We don't build robot bodies, and we don't train foundation models. We focus on the data infrastructure of the industry — capture, cleaning, alignment, training, every step done right. Together with robot OEMs, foundation-model providers and system integrators — each in our own craft, co-building side by side — we make data the real engine that drives embodied AI into the real world.
s1.p4: Embodied AI is a long voyage. Shipwrights forge the hulls (robot bodies), cartographers chart the routes (foundation models and algorithms). Dolphin Lynxi builds the buoys, lighthouses and current-monitoring network — giving every ship more reliable navigation, clearer routes, and steadier voyage.
s1.p5: Investing for the long run, walking with our partners — together with robot OEMs, foundation-model providers and system integrators, let the data tide lift the whole fleet, onward to the boundless ocean of embodied AI.

s1b.title: SLOGAN · word by word

left.title: Data flows like tide
left.desc: A footnote to the Scaling Law. When a growing capture network across many cities delivers real-world data at industrial cadence, scale itself becomes the answer.

right.title: Intelligence emerges
right.desc: Emergence is inevitable. Once data-scale × compute-density crosses the threshold, intelligence arrives as surely as morning mist rising from the tide.

s1b.foot: What we do: keep the former flowing in endlessly so that the latter inevitably happens.

s2.title: Join Dolphin Lynxi
s2.desc: Help us build the buoys, lighthouses and current-monitoring networks. Send résumé → plumpost@sina.com

job1.title: Embodied-AI Data Algorithm Engineer
job1.r1: Design pipelines for multimodal data cleaning, annotation, synthesis & quality assessment
job1.r2: Build automated mining & augmentation to boost diversity
job1.r3: Build closed-loop data system: capture → train → deploy → hard-case mining
job1.r4: Sim2Real data alignment to reduce the sim-to-real gap
job1.r5: Track Open X-Embodiment / DROID datasets & governance standards
job1.q1: MS+ in CS / automation / robotics / math
job1.q2: Proficient in Python/C++, familiar with PyTorch, HDF5/Zarr/LeRobot
job1.q4: Bonus: real-robot capture / Isaac Sim / Mujoco / Gazebo
job1.q5: Bonus: data-quality assessment, long-tail analysis, active learning

job2.title: Embodied-AI Capture Hardware Engineer
job2.r1: Design / build / maintain capture systems: teleop, multi-view cameras, force, tactile
job2.r3: Build host software: real-time visualization, recording, validation
job2.r4: On-site layout management + SOP authoring + operator training
job2.q1: BS+ in mechatronics / automation / CS / instrumentation
job2.q2: Familiar with ROS / ROS2, can independently develop sensor drivers
job2.q4: Calibration experience for cameras / LiDAR / IMU / force
job2.q5: Bonus: VR (Vive / Quest) / teleop hardware / ESP32 firmware / EtherCAT

job3.title: Evaluation Engineer
job3.desc: Build dataset-quality eval, model-benchmark frameworks, and Sim2Real eval closures. LeRobot ecosystem familiarity preferred.

job4.title: Datacenter Operations Engineer
job4.desc: Run Dolphin's in-house GPU datacenter: elastic scheduling, self-healing, cost optimization. K8s + GPU cluster experience required.

job5.title: Data Capture Operations
job5.desc: Run city-level capture nodes: site expansion, operator training, SOP refinement, QA pipeline management.

job6.title: Enterprise Account Manager
job6.desc: Partner with leading robot OEMs, foundation-model providers and enterprise manufacturers — deliver custom data-capture engagements.

job7.title: Trainer / Curriculum Designer
job7.desc: Design & teach Dolphin Academy ToC / B-end courses. Requires hands-on LeRobot experience and public-speaking skill.

s3.title: Contact us
s3.desc: For any business, partnership, application, or inquiry — email or visit us.
